title: Doff Multi-Purpose Slow Release Plant Food– 1Kg Fast-Acting Controlled Release Garden Fertiliser for Healthy Growth of Flowers & Shrubs – Encourages Root Development – Feeds for 3 Months
features: VERSATILE PLANT FOOD – Boost the health of flowers, vegetables, fruit, and shrubs with Doff Multi-Purpose Slow Release Plant Food granules. Enriched with NPK 12-5-10, and nutrients, this fast-acting plant fertiliser promotes healthier, stronger plants in outdoor gardens and indoor plants

BOOST GROWTH & RESILIENCE – Rich in nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium, this garden fertiliser strengthens roots, produces bigger blooms, and encourages overall healthy growth. Sprinkle 25-30g of the slow-release fertiliser granules onto beds and borders and lightly fork in, feeding every 3 months

EASY-TO-USE FORMULA – This plant fertiliser is supplied in a convenient easy-to-use shaker dispensing bottle for quick and efficient application. Whether nurturing hanging baskets or expansive garden plants, Doff’s plant food saves time and effort, offering professional results with minimal fuss

RELIABLE & EFFECTIVE RESULTS – This high-quality flower feed provides consistent slow-release nutrition for thriving plants year-round. Ideal for indoor and outdoor plants, a 1kg bottle provides 3 months of nutrient-rich feed to support healthy growth in plants large and small

NOURISHING PLANT FEED – With decades of expert experience, Doff products are your go-to for vibrant, healthy plants. Our quality-crafted feeds and straight solutions are proudly made in the UK, offering effective and complete nutritional plant food to help your garden grow

specifications_table.Included components: ‎Doff Slow Release Plant Food Multi Purpose
